creator: lab+bsd@thinkum.space
text: The stray windowbuilder ref in my comment - I may be interested in developing a port to build windowbuilder on FreeBSD. imoe it's been useful with a local Eclipse installation under OpenSUSE. Although the Eclipse Marketplace tools can be used to install Windowbuilder in Eclipse on FreeBSD, the actual window-building parts might not be useful without a build for FreeBSD? I'll address that in a separate patch, of course, pursuant of any local Makefile
